rationale: In the citing paper, Grewal et al. (2013) appears as a single methodological example in the endogeneity discussion (simultaneity risk), not as a core theoretical or empirical pillar of the study. The hypotheses, conceptual model, and main contribution are developed from other training/incentive, legitimacy, and control literatures without a distinct functional dependence on this specific paper. There is no clear evidence that the citing paper extends, refines, challenges, or applies Grewal et al.'s framework directly.
